name: child-health-tracker-monorepo
description: FirstCry Intellitots Child Health & Allergy Tracker Monorepo

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm run install-all && cross-env CI=false npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run install-all && cross-env CI=false npm run build --prefix frontend
